message:
🐛 Fix 28 corrupted test files: remove extra }) and restore clean versions

Many test files had extra `})` closing blocks from squash merge
corruption, causing PARSE_ERROR in CI. Fixed by:
- Removing trailing extra `)` from 24 files
- Restoring 3 files from clean branch (analytics, shared, useNightlyE2EData)
- Fixing useArgoCD.test.ts extra closings

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
